reasoning: The control AU-10(2) focuses on non-repudiation by validating the binding of information producer identity. In Kubernetes, this can be addressed through comprehensive audit logging to ensure all actions are recorded and can be traced back to the initiating identity. Enabling audit logging and configuring retention policies ensures that logs are available for forensic analysis. Additionally, ensuring that the API server has authentication and RBAC authorization enabled helps in binding actions to authenticated and authorized identities.
